prompt: I'm setting up a new personal project and can't decide between SQLite or PostgreSQL. It's a dashboard to track my expenses, probably around 10-20 tables, no more than 50k rows total, but I want it to be easy to deploy on a cheap VPS. What would you recommend?

assertions.name: gives_clear_recommendation
assertions.description: Gives a clear recommendation (SQLite or PostgreSQL), doesn't just say 'it depends'

assertions.name: considers_constraints
assertions.description: Mentions at least 2 of the user's constraints (cheap VPS, 50k rows, easy deploy)

assertions.name: provides_reasoning
assertions.description: Explains the reasoning behind the recommendation with technical arguments
